text_block_list.text:
On the rooftop, I encountered Stay Gold 
making a difficult expression. As I asked 
what was on her mind…

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
I… slept too much and… My head… 
It hurts…

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: Yea, I was like really sleepy from the morning today. I even ended up skipping the entire day of class… Fuaa…
choice_data_list: That is… way too much sleep!
That is… way too much sleep!

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
But I was just so sleepy, so it can't 
be helped.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
When you're sleepy you sleep, and when 
you want to wake up you get up so —

While I was worried about Stay Gold… I 
came to realise that there was probably 
no way she could fix this habit of hers…
